message:
🌱 Add wasmcloud: [RFC] Separate Actor and Provider SDKs mission (#790)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "wasmcloud-317-rfc-separate-actor-and-provider-sdks",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "wasmcloud: [RFC] Separate Actor and Provider SDKs",
+    "description": "[RFC] Separate Actor and Provider SDKs. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current wasmcloud deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your wasmcloud version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/name=wasmcloud\nhelm list -n wasmcloud 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working wasmcloud installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review wasmcloud configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant wasmcloud configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/name=wasmcloud\nkubectl get configmap -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=wasmcloud\n```\nThis Request for Comment is soliciting feedback on the plan for separating the wasmCloud guest and provider SDKs."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [RFC] Separate Actor and Provider SDKs",
+        "description": "This is the first step in addition of a \"transitional\" module support to `wasmcloud_actor` crate. When `module` feature is enabled, `wasmcloud_actor` relies on legacy wasmbus API. The module-based API mimics functionality exposed by component model-based support, meaning, that switch to components will be a breeze for users.\n\n## Related Issues\n## Release Information\n\n## Consumer Impact\n\n- All traits are now good-old `sync`, that may change in the future depeding on how the component model API\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n wasmcloud -l app.kubernetes.io/name=wasmcloud\nkubectl get events -n wasmcloud --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"[RFC] Separate Actor and Provider SDKs\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This is the first step in addition of a \"transitional\" module support to `wasmcloud_actor` crate. When `module` feature is enabled, `wasmcloud_actor` relies on legacy wasmbus API. The module-based API mimics functionality exposed by component model-based support, meaning, that switch to components will be a breeze for users.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "wasmcloud",
+      "incubating",
+      "runtime",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "wasmcloud"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",

+      "feature"
+    ],

+    "sourceUrls": {

+      "pr": "https://github.com/wasmCloud/wasmCloud/pull/345"
+    },
+    "reactions": 3,
+    "comments": 17,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl",
+      "wash"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with wasmcloud installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
